# terrible_grafana_grafana_cloud_stack (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cloud_api_key` (String) Cloud API Key to authenticate with Grafana Cloud.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Sets the name of stack. Conventionally matches the URL of the instance. For example, `stackslug.grafana.net`.
- `org_slug` (String) Name of the organization under which Cloud stack is created.
- `stack_slug` (String) Sets the subdomain of the Grafana instance. For example, if slug is **stackslug**, the instance URL will be `https://stackslug.grafana.net`.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `delete_protection` (Boolean) Enables or disables deletion protection for the Cloud stack. When set to true, the stack cannot be deleted unless this flag is explicitly disabled.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `region` (String) Sets the region for the Grafana Cloud stack.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) State for the Grafana Cloud stack.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `url` (String) If you use a custom domain for the instance, you can provide it here. If not provided, Will be set to `https://stackslug.grafana.net`.

### Read-Only

- `alertmanager_name` (String) Name of the alertmanager instance.
- `alertmanager_url` (String) URL of the alertmanager instance.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `cluster_slug` (String) Slug for the cluster where the Grafana stack is deployed.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `loki_url` (String) URl for the Loki instance.
- `orgID` (Number) ID of the Grafana Cloud organization.
- `prometheus_url` (String) URl for the Prometheus instance.
- `tempo_url` (String) URl for the Tempo instance.
